title: Bulk RFQ: 51 description-only positions across all families
notes: Scale stress test: 51 numbered positions, zero SKUs, phrased in the customer's own vocabulary (linka, kostki, trytytki, oczka, skrętka, kolor uziemienia), spanning nearly every catalog family so vector search gets no topic locality. One batch search returns ~500 candidates to rerank — tests long-context degradation (items in the middle of the list are where picks drift). Two positions are genuinely absent from the catalog (generator set, emergency exit luminaire) and must land in unmatched. Variant traps included: 5-wire WAGO in the 6mm² series (pos. 39), shielded-or-not cat.6 ambiguity (pos. 16, altSkus).

customer.name: BudMax Generalny Wykonawca
customer.profile: General contractor purchasing department; sends tender-style numbered RFQ lists compiled from subcontractors' inputs.

request:
Dzień dobry,

1. Wyłącznik instalacyjny B16 230V – 24 szt

Dział Zakupów, BudMax

unmatched: oprawa awaryjna LED z piktogramem EXIT
